name: Ham & Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of chicken soup
1 can Whole kernel corn; drained (8 oz.)
recipeInstructions: Cook noodles according to package directions until barely tender (approximately 5 to 6 minutes). Drain and toss with just enough oil to coat. Add noodles and remaining ingredients to a greased Crock pot and stir to mix. Cover and cook on LOW setting for 7 to 9 hours (about 6 hours in my experience). Makes 2 servings or 1 1/2 to 2 quarts.
